steps.title: Track the general-to-specific shift
steps.content: The first sentence introduces edge modeling as one process used by digital artists. The second sentence explains exactly what that process involves: piecing separate shapes together to create 3D objects.

steps.title: Rule out wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice A adds a separate point instead of narrowing the first idea. Choice C signals a result, but the second sentence clarifies rather than follows as an effect. Choice D signals comparison, but the two sentences discuss the same process.

steps.title: Name the precise elaboration
steps.content: The remaining transition marks a move from a broad statement to a more precise explanation of that same idea. The answer is B.
